LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-08-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT AND REQUEST TO RE-SET CASE FOR TRIAL; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. 1. ALTHOUGH TIMELY FILED/ MOTION IS UNOPPOSED. 2. MOTION/GRANTED AS DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT MUCH LESS SIGNED IT. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: BARBARA A. ZUNIGA; CLERK: V. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Skt Aside Notice Of Settlement And Request To Re-Set Case For Trial; Declaration Of Brian Langfdyk
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion To Set Aside Notice Of Settlement And Request To Re-Set Case For Trial.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

1. Although timely filed/ motion is unopposed.
2. Motion/granted as defendant has failed to comply with settlement agreement much less signed it.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Barbara A. Zuniga; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-25-28 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Set For Trial On Jun-03-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
